description_long: This object depicts an adult male figure with extremely elongated and distorted limbs, particularly the arms, which stretch out to an unnatural length far beyond the body. The figure is dressed in a vertically striped shirt and long pants, with the shirt featuring a V-neck and short sleeves. The head is proportionate and features a short hairstyle and facial hair, while the body and legs are relatively normal in proportion compared to the arms. The shoes are visible and appear to be casual, possibly sneakers. The overall appearance is highly stylized and surreal, with the exaggerated limb proportions making the figure appear otherworldly.
description: A surreal adult male figure with extremely elongated arms, wearing a striped shirt, long pants, and casual shoes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full face, V-neck striped shirt, and the dramatic extension of both arms outward.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extreme length of the arms and the profile of the head and body.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, shirt, and the arms stretching away from the body.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the elongated arms and the side profile of the figure.
attribute_clothing_type: casual short-sleeve shirt and long pants
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended outward
